s1.ptxt: Make marks (1) as shown in figure with wiper motor (2) stopped.
Connect battery positive (+) and negative (–) terminals to wiper motor connector terminals as shown to operate motor at low speed. If wiper motor does not operate, replace wiper motor.
Disconnect terminal “2” from battery negative (–) terminal to stop wiper motor when marks (5) are not aligned.
Connect terminal “3” to battery negative (–) terminal.
Observe the wiper motor (4) turns once again then stops at a specified position as shown.
Repeat Steps 2) through 4) several times and check that the wiper motor stops at the specified position every time.
If check result is not as specified, replace wiper motor.
